mob.00037e55: A trusty, powerful steed. Taming it might prove difficult...
mob.00261566: Is that really just a hallucination?

mob.020885d0: Short-lived attack form of the hivelord. One isn't much of a threat, but...

mob.050179db: The parrot squawks, \"They're a Parrot! BAWWK!\"
mob.064334f5: can't find ladder or staircase going {0}
mob.0699ba96: She's the queen of bees, BZZ BZZ!

mob.0b37c83e: The cold is really getting to him.

mob.0bcf60de: Large blue worm. What happens if you put your hand in his mouth?.

mob.0d2cb459: A fox, scraping by the icemoon hostile atmosphere.

mob.0fdc93ea: A moth-person member of the Syndicate, wielding an SMG.

mob.15fc7b14: Outfit registered, use select equipment to equip it.
mob.16406026: can't upload laws to a shell!
mob.166f6d97: A nonfunctional fungal creature created by bad code or celestial mistake. Point and laugh.

mob.18eeb3d8: {0} is holding someone at gunpoint, you cannot push past.

mob.1ac1ea66: Not known for their pleasant disposition.

mob.1be131e3: It's a massive mushroom... with legs?

mob.1d31c695: You can see what was once a monkey under the densely packed snow. It doesn't look friendly.

mob.20b079b5: ...how are you examining this? THIS THING ISN'T EVEN EMBODIED.

mob.25332178: Wait this one's red? This cannot be good... right??

mob.2bccef11: A ferocious, fang-bearing creature that resembles a fish.

mob.30c35d61: Vox pirates often utilize a mix of energy and ballistic weapons in combat.
mob.310ded98: A divine being sent by the Honkmother to spread joy. It's not dangerous, but it's a bit of a nuisance.

mob.32da3a89: A large, adorable creature covered in armor with pink bows.

mob.399cf295: Furry and black, it looks defenseless. This one has sparkling purple eyes.

mob.3f4ee3ff: A traitorous clockwork knight who lived on, despite its creators destruction.

mob.41f41d52: A gentle, peaceful forest animal. How did this get into space?
mob.447375bd: {0} You're a mostly harmless bear/butter hybrid that everyone loves. People can take bites out of you if they're hungry, but you regenerate health so quickly that it generally doesn't matter. You're remarkably resilient to any damage besides this and it's hard for you to really die at all. You should go around and bring happiness and free butter to the station!
mob.46f080bf: A shipbreaker scavenger, carrying a laser gun.
mob.46f35e89: The offspring of an ice drake, weak in comparison but still terrifying.
mob.47061cf6: A horror from beyond this realm, summoned by bad code.
mob.47e1fe26: Now you know how the fly feels.
mob.48025836: An officer of Nanotrasen's private security force. Seems rather unpleased to meet you.
mob.487f1beb: A tree straight from the tropics.
mob.48a365c9: A ghostly follower of the Blood Mother.
mob.49282f6a: A freshly hatched blood worm. It looks hungry and weak, requiring blood to grow further.
mob.4a28973f: The floor you walk on. It looks near-impervious to damage.
mob.4b031d62: The overmind. It controls the blob.
mob.4b27b045: An anthromorphic fennec member of the Syndicate, wielding an energy sword and shield.
mob.4b2c6cdf: An ancient miner lost to time, chosen and changed by the Necropolis, encased in a suit of armor. Only a chosen few can match his speed and strength.
mob.4c05fe90: The one you've come here for. Finish this.
mob.4c1f2352: A massive, armored construct built to spearhead attacks and soak up enemy fire.
mob.4d0ad66e: Goliaths are biologically immortal, and rare specimens have survived for centuries. This one is clearly ancient, and its tentacles constantly churn the earth around it.
mob.4d3c607f: Furry, brown, and fat. While kind of cute its size horrifies you. This one has dark purple eyes and seems heavily armored.
mob.4d72b52e: Twitching crustaceans boiled red by the sulfurous fumes of the chasms in which they lurk. They have a particular taste for fingers.
mob.506ce9f7: A construct of runed metal and red crystals, a living mannequin.

mob.520aed43:
It's full of watery goodness.

mob.53598cae: A barkeeping drone, a robot built to tend bars.
mob.539c70fc: A glass-like entity from the void between stars. You probably shouldn't stare.
mob.53c67b46: No usable AI shell beacons detected.

mob.54156bd4: The legionnaire's head floating by itself.  One shouldn't get too close, though once it sees you, you really don't have a choice.
mob.557ec8d5: Space-faring Vox raider, armed with a laser rifle and wearing a MODsuit.
mob.559339a9: {0}: Grab. Passively causes stamina damage when grabbing someone.
mob.55aa199f: An example of sexual dimorphism, this female goliath looks much different than the males of her species.  She is, however, just as dangerous, if not more.

mob.66f0a739: A follower of the Blood Mother, either experimented on or just devout enough to be turned into a monster.

mob.68f1452f: You don't need to be faster than a space bear, you just need to outrun your crewmates.
mob.6963c6df: {0}: Grab. Passively gives you a chance to immediately aggressively grab someone. Not always successful.

mob.6ba45497: A not so ferocious, fang bearing creature that resembles a shark. This one seems a little big for its tank.

mob.8539c9fd: too far from node or core!
mob.85fd294b: A skeleton merchant, he seems very humerus.
